game_info.title: Snake vs Blocks
game_info.concept:
Swipe your finger to guide a snake of balls and break the bricks.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/snake-vs-block/id1233739175

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Swipe your finger to guide a snake of balls and break the bricks.
Try to break as many bricks as possible.
Get additional balls and make the biggest snake ever!

Very easy to play but very hard to reach high scores!

Game Features:
- Free to play
- Endless gameplay
- Simple swipe control
- Challenge your friends with the best highscore
game_info.description: Guide your snake through an endless obstacle course! Your snake is made of numbered balls - collect additional balls to grow longer, and break through numbered bricks by crashing into them. Each brick shows a number indicating how many balls you'll lose when breaking through it. Avoid running out of balls or hitting obstacles that are too strong! The game gets faster and more challenging as you progress. Can you achieve the highest score?
game_info.controls:
Left Arrow: Move snake left
Right Arrow: Move snake right
Space: (Reserved for future features)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement controls and collision detection with bricks and collectibles. This ensures the snake responds correctly to input and interacts properly with game objects.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the snake left and right alternately while attempting to collect ball collectibles and break through low-numbered bricks. Avoid high-numbered bricks that would deplete the snake.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The snake should move smoothly left and right, collect balls to grow, and successfully break through bricks with numbers lower than the snake length. The test is successful when the snake survives for at least 100 frames and collects multiple items.
